skill.above: {ObjectA} is above {ObjectB}, meaning {ObjectA} is positioned higher than {ObjectB} without touching it
skill.below: {ObjectA} is below {ObjectB}, meaning {ObjectA} is positioned lower than {ObjectB} without touching it
skill.left of: {ObjectA} is positioned on the left side of {ObjectB}
skill.right of: {ObjectA} is positioned on the right side of {ObjectB}
